common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: you can turn on or turn off your app push config setting through this open api

error_list.name: error_param
error_list.description: this callback_url is invalid, please check your callback_url.

error_list.name: error_param
error_list.description: Your app's callback_url is empty, please input a callback_url before you turn on push config.

error_list.name: error_param
error_list.description: The call back url can not be Shopee intranet address, please change another new call back url

error_list.name: error_param
error_list.description: The information you queried is not found.

error_list.name: error_param
error_list.description: Shopee have sent a test push to this call back url, but we didn't get any response in 3 seconds with 2xx code, please check your service.

error_list.name: error_param
error_list.description: Shopee have sent a test push to this call back url, the response code we get from this callback_url is not 2xx code, please check your service.

common_error_list.name: error_auth

common_error_list.name: api_suspended
common_error_list.description: The API is offline. Please call v2 API instead.

common_error_list.name: error_limit
common_error_list.description: The total API call number made by your APP has reached the daily API call limit, please try again after 00: 00 (UTC+08:00)

common_error_list.name: error_rate_limit
common_error_list.description: Too many requests. You have reached the rate limit. Please try again later.

common_error_list.name: source_ip_undeclared
common_error_list.description: Request Source IP ({ip}) is undeclared. Please declare all your IP addresses in the Shopee Open Platform Console > App list > IP Address Whitelist

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: Permission denied. This API is currently offline or the request path is incorrect.

common_error_list.description: Partner_id is invalid, should be an integer between 0 and 4294967295.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: no timestamp.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: Timestamp is invalid, should be an integer between 0 and 4294967295.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: Timestamp is expired.

common_error_list.name: error_partner_key_expired
common_error_list.description: Your API partner key has expired, please reset the Live API Partner Key in Console to get a new valid partner key to call open api.

common_error_list.name: error_api_permission
common_error_list.description: This app type has no permission to this API.

request_params.description: The callback url of push mechanism. It is the address where the Shopee will send the push message to. If you don't set any callback_url before, this parameters is required.
request_params.name: callback_url

request_params.description:
Turn on push config, Shopee will send the push message into the callback url.

1=Shop authorization for partners

2=Shop deauthorization for partners

3=Order status update push

4=TrackingNo push

5=Shopee Updates

6=Banned item push

7=item promotion push

8=reserved stock change push

9=promotionn update push

10=webchat push

11=video upload push

12=openapi authorization expiry push

13=brand register result
request_params.name: set_push_config_on

request_params.description:
Turn off Push config, Shopee won't send the push message into the callback url.

1=Shop authorization for partners

2=Shop deauthorization for partners

3=Order status update push

4=TrackingNo push

5=Shopee Updates

6=Banned item push

7=item promotion push

8=reserved stock change push

9=promotionn update push

10=webchat push

11=video upload push

12=openapi authorization expiry push

13=brand register result
request_params.name: set_push_config_off

request_params.description: Use this filed to set shops that need to be blocked.Please input no more than 500 shop id.
request_params.name: blocked_shop_id_list

response_params.name: request_id
response_params.description: The identifier for an API request for error tracking.
Indicate error type if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
response_params.name: error

response_params.description: Indicate error details if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
response_params.name: message

children.description: Use this field to indicate whether the configuration is set successfully.
children.name: result

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.uat.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/push/set_app_push_config?partner_id=partner_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
  CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => '{
    "blocked_shop_id_list": [
        10010,
        20020,
        30030
    ],
    "callback_url": "https://open.shopee.com/",
    "set_push_config_off": [
        6,
        7,
        11,
        12,
        13
    ],
    "set_push_config_on": [
        1,
        2,
        3,
        4,
        5,
        8,
        9,
        10
    ]
}',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;

import requests
import json

url = "https://partner.uat.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/push/set_app_push_config?partner_id=partner_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp"

payload=json.dumps({
  "blocked_shop_id_list": [
    10010,
    20020,
    30030
  ],
  "callback_url": "https://open.shopee.com/",
  "set_push_config_off": [
    6,
    7,
    11,
    12,
    13
  ],
  "set_push_config_on": [
    1,
    2,
    3,
    4,
    5,
    8,
    9,
    10
  ]
})
headers = {
  'Content-Type': 'application/json'
}
response = requests.request("POST",url,headers=headers, data=payload, allow_redirects=False)

print(response.text)
